scope: Shared profile issue/error-code helper consolidation plus representative detail-shape tests.
summary: Shared helper scripts/profile_issues.py centralizes stable profile issue constants, IssueDetail serialization, issue code sorting, and add_issue/add_warning helpers.
Integration in scripts/module_runner.py and scripts/validate_module_profile.py preserves P2-8 code strings and existing human-readable errors/warnings.
Tests cover loader error, explicit-manifest hard error, and discovery warning detail object shapes, including code/message/severity/component/path/field/profile_id/module_id where applicable.
No broadened module execution behavior or target-touching side effects found.
non_blocking_recommendations: Keep real module execution disabled until explicit runner authorization, run-ledger, candidate finding/evidence, and post-scan review gates are implemented.
validation_seen: Focused profile/runner tests passed: 31 passed, 9 subtests passed.
Full scripts unittest suite passed: 121 passed, 2 skipped.
git diff --check produced only expected Windows CRLF warnings.
